title: Syzygium montis-adam
taxonomy: Syzygium montis-adam is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae. It is native to Papua New Guinea and is a member of the genus Syzygium. The genus Syzygium is a group of plants commonly known as water apples or rose apples. The family Myrtaceae is a large and diverse group of plants that includes eucalyptus, guava, and clove trees. Syzygium montis-adam is a rare and endemic species.
